highlight.header2: 'I always thought that record would stand until it was broken' - Yogi Berra
highlight.point1: The Manfred Man overtook Fire Sale's OBP record from 2023 with a .425 OBP
highlight.point2: The Manfred Man also finished first in 4 batting and 2 pitching stats
highlight.point3: The Short Porch finished 7th or worse in every batting stat
